PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('This is the text that gets assigned to $a.\nAnd this too.\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_SYNTAX)(':json')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('This is supposed to be valid JSON text\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_ESCAPES)('/t')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('There is a tab\tbefore 'before'\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is indented 2 spaces in the source, but produces\n  a result flush left with the initial 'T'\n    This line is thus indented 2 spaces.\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  | END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is indented 2 spaces in the source, and produces\n  a result with left margin equal to the source file's left edge.\n    This line is thus indented 4 spaces.\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('                                        END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  XXX\n    YYY\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('   | END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This line will not be terminated by a new line\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  -END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('b')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This line will not be terminated by a new line\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  |- END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_ESCAPES)('/L')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  I am a very long line of text that is difficult to work \\n  with. The escaped end of line joins the long line into one.\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)(' | - END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('Verse 8 of The Raven')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  Then this ebony bird beguiling my sad fancy into smiling,\n  By the grave and stern decorum of the countenance it wore,\n  `Though thy crest be shorn and shaven, thou,' I said, `art sure no craven.\n  Ghastly grim and ancient raven wandering from the nightly shore -\n  Tell me what thy lordly name is on the Night's Plutonian shore!'\n  Quoth the raven, `Nevermore.'\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  | Verse 8 of The Raven')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('FIRST')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('SECOND')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is the text for the first heredoc\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('    FIRST')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is the text for the second\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('    SECOND')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('FIRST')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is the text for the first heredoc\n')
      PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  FIRST')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('SECOND')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is the text for the second\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  SECOND')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
      PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiElement(.)('.')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('upcase')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  I am not shouting. At least not yet...\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  | END')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('asdfaasdf asdf\nasdfdsfas asdfasdf\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('    BOM')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('BOM')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('    BOM')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('asdfaasdf asdf\nasdfdsfas asdfasdf\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  |-   BOM')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('|-BOM')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('BOM')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  | -  BOM')
